framework: Raoul Pal Global Liquidity Index (Public Approximation)
disclaimer: This scorecard models Raoul Pal's publicly stated GLI framework using public central bank data. It does NOT replicate the proprietary GMI model.

bank_of_japan.signal: bullish | neutral | bearish | carry unwind risk

global_m2_usd.primary_driver: USD strength / CB easing / CB tightening
global_m2_usd.note: Public approximation; GMI uses proprietary weighting

credit_impulse.us_credit_impulse: positive rising | positive falling | negative | bottoming
credit_impulse.china_credit_impulse: positive rising | positive falling | negative | bottoming
credit_impulse.global_direction: positive rising | positive falling | negative | bottoming

demographic_debt_context.long_cycle_phase: early monetization | mid monetization | late-stage forced debasement

narrative_window.dominant_narrative: macro beta | technology adoption | regulatory event
narrative_window.btc_narrative: liquidity beta | digital gold | technology S-curve

dxy.trend: rising (bearish for EM and crypto) | falling (bullish)

cross_asset_allocation.btc_tactical: strongly overweight | overweight | neutral | underweight | minimal

cycle_reversal_conditions: Reversal 1: [Specific condition that would change GLI phase]
Reversal 2: [Specific condition that would change the narrative]
